source_spans.text: L. minutus populations had higher acid tolerances in circum-neutral lakes with a history of acidiﬁcation

copepods in circum-neutral acid-recovering lakes were less acid-tolerant than were copepods in lakes with longer recovery time
indicated a ﬁtness trade-off in copepods with high acid tolerances at circum-neutral pH

edges.original_sentence: L. minutus populations had higher acid tolerances in circum-neutral lakes with a history of acidiﬁcation than in local and distant lakes that were never acidiﬁed.

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:e8644a7bb97f
edges.original_sentence: This adaptive reversal in acid tolerance of L. minutus populations following lake recovery was supported by the results of a laboratory experiment that indicated a ﬁtness trade-off in copepods with high acid tolerances at circum-neutral pH.
